summary: Fixed parseFindings() false-positive (startsWith vs includes) that caused reviewer lines referencing prior 🔴 findings to be misclassified as critical — root cause of the previous review FAIL. Preserved artifactEmitExtras and executeRunPaths in both review handshake paths, added resetRegistry() at _runSingleFeature start to prevent extension leakage across features, and added 5 new tests covering handshake merge integration, path registration, and parseFindings regression prevention.
